close_reason: Simplified to majority quorum and removed shard_tags
description:
## Goal
Replace per-shard quorum logic with simple majority quorum.

## File
`lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/log_recovery_planning_phase.ex`

## Changes
- Remove per-shard quorum logic (`group_logs_by_shard`, `evaluate_shard_combinations`)
- Replace with simple majority check: `locked_count > total_count / 2`
- Compute version_vector as `{max(oldest), min(newest)}` across all survivors
- Store `survivor_log_ids` in recovery_attempt for replay phase

## Implementation
```elixir
def execute(%RecoveryAttempt{} = recovery_attempt, context) do
  old_log_ids = Map.keys(context.old_transaction_system_layout[:logs] || %{})
  log_recovery_info = recovery_attempt.log_recovery_info_by_id
  locked_count = map_size(log_recovery_info)
  total_count = length(old_log_ids)

  # Simple majority quorum
  if locked_count > total_count / 2 do
    version_vector = compute_version_vector(log_recovery_info)
    durable_version = compute_durable_version(log_recovery_info)
    survivor_ids = Map.keys(log_recovery_info)
    # ... update recovery_attempt
    {recovery_attempt, :ok}
  else
    {recovery_attempt, {:stalled, {:error, :unable_to_meet_log_quorum}}}
  end
end
```
title: Simplify LogRecoveryPlanningPhase to majority quorum
